flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Oregon Coast Community College fell 52% between 2006 and 2009 (31.2% → 15.0%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Oregon Coast Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (11.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Oregon Coast Community College fell 39% between 2021 and 2024 ($9.1k → $5.5k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Oregon Coast Community College rose 32% between 2021 and 2024 (44.2% → 58.1%).
